onboarding.slide1Body: Millions of Indians live with diabetes, thyroid issues, BP, PCOD and more — but doctors rarely explain the "why". This app does.
onboarding.slide2Body: Swipe through bite-sized concept cards, test yourself with mini-quizzes, earn XP and badges as you level up your health knowledge.
onboarding.slide3Body: Got a question? Ask our GPT-4o-mini powered tutor inside every ailment section — get answers in plain Indian English, anytime.
onboarding.noAccountNeeded: All data stays on your device. No account needed.

signin.appTagline: Your personal guide to understanding and managing common ailments.
signin.noAccountNeeded: All data stays on your device. No account needed.

home.sectionsSubtitle: Tap any section to start learning

ailment.redFlagsIntro: 🚨 See a doctor immediately if you experience any of these:

quiz.question: Question {{n}} / {{total}}
quiz.passMsg: Section complete! Move on to the next ailment.
quiz.failMsg: Score ≥80% to mark this section complete. Try again anytime!

chat.title: AI Tutor 🤖
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about any of the 9 ailments
chat.emptyHintAilment: Ask me anything about {{title}} — diet, symptoms, lifestyle tips.
chat.emptyHintGlobal: Ask me about any of the 9 common ailments — diet, symptoms, lifestyle.
chat.missingKey: Add your OpenAI key in Settings to use AI chat.

settings.title: Settings ⚙️
settings.apiKeyHint: Used for AI Tutor chat. Stored only on this device.
settings.resetWarning: This clears everything from this device.
settings.confirmReset: This will delete your profile and all progress. Continue?
